title: Backrooms Perfected
description: Perfecting the backrooms Minecraft experience with Faithful Backrooms!
body:
# Backrooms Perfected
> _The Perfect Backrooms Experience!_

![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)  ![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)

Backrooms Perfected is a Modpack that attempts to perfect the minecraft backrooms formula. Play with friends, by yourself, any way you'd like.

Contains levels 0, 0.2, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 6.1, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 114, 188, 279, The Metro, The End, The Maintenance Tunnels, The Poolrooms, and many more!

Based around Faithful Backrooms by WhyAntique

Credits to Toby Fox for the title music!

![poolrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MCmnmbuK/images/f1559b0567e1271bf6793a3adf6a938b0579044d.png)
